title: Excavating tooth assembly for earth-digging equipment
abstract: A tooth assembly having an adapter, a tooth, and a pin. The adapter and the tooth each have a first portion and a second portion. The first portion of the adapter is adapted to be combined with an earth-digging implement. The second portion of the adapter is adapted to be combined with the tooth. The second portion of the adapter has an opening adapted to receive an engagement member extending from the second portion of the tooth. The first portion of the tooth is adapted to engage the material being displaced by the implement and the second portion is adapted to be combined with the adapter. The second portion of the tooth has an opening adapted to receive an engagement member extending from the second portion of the adapter. The pin is inserted through openings in both the adapter and the tooth to secure the two components together during operation.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is as follows: 1. A tooth assembly for attachment to an implement, said tooth assembly comprising: an adapter having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the adapter is adapted to be combined with an earth-digging implement and the second portion of the adapter has an opening and an engagement member extending therefrom; a tooth having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the tooth is adapted to engage material being displaced by the implement and the second portion of the tooth has an opening and an engagement member extending therefrom; wherein the opening in the second end of the adapter is adapted to receive the engagement member extending from the tooth; wherein the opening in the second end of the tooth is adapted to receive the engagement member extending from the adapter; and a pin having a pin head combined with a shaft, wherein the pin is adapted to extend through an aperture in the adapter and an aperture in the tooth to secure the components in an assembled configuration. 2. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the implement is one of a bucket and a blade. 3. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the tooth has a top surface and the aperture in the tooth is generally perpendicular to the top surface of the tooth. 4. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the tooth has a top surface and a recessed portion in the top surface around the aperture in the tooth. 5. The tooth assembly of claim 4 wherein the recessed portion has an asymmetrical shape and the pin head has a corresponding asymmetrical shape so as to be received by the recessed portion. 6. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the engagement member extending from the tooth has a first surface extending in a first direction and a second surface extending in a second direction and the engagement member extending from the adapter has a first surface extending in a first direction and a second surface extending in a second direction; and wherein in the assembled configuration the two first surfaces engage each other and the two second surface engage each other. 7. The tooth assembly of claim 6 wherein the two first surfaces are generally perpendicular to the two second surfaces. 8. The tooth assembly of claim 6 wherein the two first surfaces are flat and the two second surfaces are flat. 9. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein one of the engagement member extending from the adapter and the engagement member extending from the tooth includes a channel adapted to receive a portion of the other engagement member. 10. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the engagement member extending from the tooth is generally "T" shaped. 11. The tooth assembly of claim 1 wherein the engagement member extending from the tooth has a distal end; and wherein the engagement member extending from the tooth has a head at its distal end. 12. The tooth assembly of claim 11 wherein the head is a blade that tapers to become narrower at the distal end. 13. The tooth assembly of claim 11 wherein the head has a curved lip at the distal end. 14. A tooth assembly for attachment to an implement, said tooth assembly comprising: an adapter having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the adapter is adapted to be combined with an earth-digging implement and the second portion of the adapter has an opening and an engagement member extending therefrom; a tooth having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the tooth is adapted to engage material being displaced by the implement and the second portion of the tooth has an opening and an engagement member extending therefrom; wherein the opening in the second end of the adapter is adapted to receive the engagement member extending from the tooth; 

wherein the opening in the second end of the tooth is adapted to receive the engagement member extending from the adapter; and a pin having a pin head combined with a shaft, a compression member, and a compressible material, wherein the compressible material is between the shaft and the compression member; wherein the pin is adapted to extend through an aperture in the adapter and an aperture in the tooth to secure the components in an assembled configuration. 15. The tooth assembly of claim 14 wherein the compression member is compressible against the compressible material so the compression member has a first position that is a first distance away from the shaft and a second position that is a second distance away from the shaft. 16. The tooth assembly of claim 14 wherein the shaft of the pin has a first longitudinal member and a second longitudinal member, the first longitudinal member and the second longitudinal member are connected by a third longitudinal member. 17. The tooth assembly of claim 16 wherein the compression member at least partially surrounds the first longitudinal member. 18. The tooth assembly of claim 14 wherein the compression member includes a recessed portion adapted to interfere with a locking member to secure the pin in a seated position. 19. A method of replacing a first tooth with a second tooth, said method comprising: 

taking a tooth assembly having an adapter combined with the first tooth by a pin, wherein the pin has a seated position within the tooth assembly; taking a second tooth having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the tooth is adapted to engage material being displaced by the implement and the second portion of the tooth has an engagement member extending therefrom, wherein the engagement member has a head; inserting the head under a portion of the pin; using the engagement member of the second tooth to remove the pin from its seated position; removing the first tooth from the adapter; connecting the adapter to the second tooth; inserting the pin through the second tooth and the adapter to its seated position. 20. A pin for securing a tooth to an adapter, said pin comprising: a pin head combined with a shaft; a compression member; and a compressible material; wherein the compressible material is between the shaft and the compression member; wherein the pin is adapted to extend through an aperture in the adapter and an aperture in the tooth to secure the components in an assembled configuration. 21. The pin of claim 20 wherein the compression member is compressible against the compressible material so the compression member has a first position that is a 

 first distance away from the shaft and a second position that is a second distance away from the shaft. 22. The pin of claim 20 wherein the shaft of the pin has a first longitudinal member and a second longitudinal member, the first longitudinal member and the second longitudinal member are connected by a third longitudinal member. 23. The pin of claim 22 wherein the compression member at least partially surrounds the first longitudinal member. 24. The pin of claim 20 wherein the compression member includes a recessed portion adapted to interfere with a locking member to secure the pin in a seated position.
